ype":"uint256"}],"stateMutability":"view","type":"function"},{"inputs":[{"internalType":"address","name":"","type":"address"}],"name":"lastInterestAccrualTimestamp","outputs":[{"internalType":"uint256","name":"","type":"uint256"}],"stateMutability":"view","type":"function"},{"inputs":[],"name":"owner","outputs":[{"internalType":"address","name":"","type":"address"}],"stateMutability":"view","type":"function"},{"inputs":[{"internalType":"uint256","name":"amount","type":"uint256"}],"name":"removeLiquidity","outputs":[],"stateMutability":"nonpayable","type":"function"},{"inputs":[],"name":"renounceOwnership","outputs":[],"stateMutability":"nonpayable","type":"function"},{"inputs":[{"internalType":"uint256","name":"amount","type":"uint256"}],"name":"repay","outputs":[],"stateMutability":"nonpayable","type":"function"},{"inputs":[],"name":"totalPoolLiquidity","outputs":[{"internalType":"uint256","name":"","type":"uint256"}],"stateMutability":"view","type":"function"},{"inputs":[{"internalType":"address","name":"newOwner","type":"address"}],"name":"transferOwnership","outputs":[],"stateMutability":"nonpayable","type":"function"},{"inputs":[{"internalType":"uint256","name":"amount","type":"uint256"}],"name":"withdrawCollateral","outputs":[],"stateMutability":"nonpayable","type":"function"}],"devdoc":{"author":"rainwaters11 \u2014 Day 22: LendingPool (DeFi Primitive)","details":"MISTY BANK ANALOGY         \u250c\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2510         \u2502  Deposit     \u2192 You bring $WATERS to the bank as collateral.  \u2502         \u2502  Borrow      \u2192 Bank lends you up to 75 % of that value.      \u2502         \u2502  Interest    \u2192 5 % APR accrues every second on your debt.    \u2502         \u2502  Repay       \u2192 Pay back principal + interest to free your    \u2502         \u2502                collateral.                                    \u2502         \u2514\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2518         BASIS POINT STANDARD (the \"professional touch\")         \u250c\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2510         \u2502  1 BPS  = 0.01 %                                             \u2502         \u2502  500 BPS = 5.00 % (ANNUAL_INTEREST_BPS)                      \u2502         \u2502  7500 BPS = 75.00 % (LTV_BPS \u2014 Loan-to-Value ratio)          \u2502         \u2502                                                              \u2502         \u2502  Formula: amount \u00d7 BPS / 10_000                              \u2502         \u2502  Example: 1000e18 \u00d7 500 / 10_000 = 50e18 (5 %)              \u2502         \u2502                                                              \u2502         \u2502  Solidity has no floating point. This is exactly how Aave    \u2502         \u2502  and Compound write production interest math.                \u2502         \u2514\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2518         INTEREST ACCRUAL \u2014 TIME MATH WITH block.timestamp         \u250c\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2510         \u2502  accrued = principal \u00d7 ANNUAL_INTEREST_BPS                   \u2502         \u2502            \u00d7 (now \u2212 lastTimestamp)                            \u2502         \u2502            / SECONDS_PER_YEAR / BPS_PRECISION                \u2502         \u2502                                                              \u2502         \u2502  lastInterestAccrualTimestamp is set on BOTH borrow() and    \u2502         \u2502  repay() so interest is never reset or double-counted.       \u2502         \u2514\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2518         SAFETY: Checks-Effects-Interactions pattern throughout.         All external calls (SafeERC20) happen AFTER state is updated.         ReentrancyGuard on every mutating function.         USE CASES IN MISTYCOIN-CORE         \u2022 Holders deposit $WATERS as collateral and borrow stablecoins.         \u2022 Liquidity providers earn interest via the lending pool.         \u2022 Integrates with MiniDex (Day 21) for collateral swaps.","errors":{"OwnableInvalidOwner(address)":[{"details":"The owner is not a valid owner account. (eg. `address(0)`)"}],"OwnableUnauthorizedAccount(address)":[{"details":"The caller account is not authorized to perform an operation."}],"ReentrancyGuardReentrantCall()":[{"details":"Unauthorized reentrant call."}],"SafeERC20FailedOperation(address)":[{"details":"An operation with an ERC-20 token failed."}]},"kind":"dev","methods":{"addLiquidity(uint256)":{"params":{"amount":"Token amount to add to the pool (must be pre-approved)."}},"borrow(uint256)":{"details":"LTV CHECK (Basis Point Standard)         maxBorrow = collateral \u00d7 LTV_BPS / BPS_PRECISION                   = collateral \u00d7 7_500  / 10_000                   = 75 % of collateral         TIMESTAMP INIT \u2014 lastInterestAccrualTimestamp is set here so the         first interest window starts at the moment of the first borrow,         not at contract deployment.  Subsequent borrows reset the clock on         the FULL balance (accrued interest is rolled into principal first).","params":{"amount":"Token amount to borrow."}},"calculateInterestAccrued(address)":{"details":"INTEREST FORMULA (annotated step-by-step)         Step 1 \u2014 elapsed seconds since last accrual:           elapsed = block.timestamp \u2212 lastInterestAccrualTimestamp[user]         Step 2 \u2014 annual interest in tokens (BPS standard):           annualInterest = principal \u00d7 ANNUAL_INTEREST_BPS / BPS_PRECISION                          = principal \u00d7 500 / 10_000                          = 5 % of principal         Step 3 \u2014 pro-rate to elapsed seconds:           accrued = annualInterest \u00d7 elapsed / SECONDS_PER_YEAR         Combined (single expression to avoid phantom overflow):           accrued = principal \u00d7 ANNUAL_INTEREST_BPS \u00d7 elapsed                     / SECONDS_PER_YEAR / BPS_PRECISION         NOTE: Division is done last-of-last (after both multiplications)         so precision is always maintained at the largest intermediate value.         TIMESTAMP EDGE CASES HANDLED:         \u2022 First borrow ever    \u2192 lastTimestamp == 0 \u2192 elapsed == now           (handled by initialising timestamp in borrow())         \u2022 Same-block call      \u2192 elapsed == 0 \u2192 accrued == 0 \u2713         \u2022 Post-repay call      \u2192 timestamp reset \u2192 no double counting \u2713","params":{"user":"Borrower address."},"returns":{"accruedInterest":" Tokens owed in accrued interest."}},"constructor":{"params":{"_asset":"ERC-20 token the pool accepts (e.g. $WATERS).","_owner":"Initial owner (can drain emergency liquidity)."}},"depositCollateral(uint256)":{"details":"Tokens transfer from msg.sender \u2192 this contract.         Follows C-E-I: validate \u2192 state change \u2192 external call.","params":{"amount":"Collateral amount (token native decimals)."}},"getMaxBorrow(address)":{"details":"maxBorrow = collateral \u00d7 LTV_BPS / BPS_PRECISION                   = collateral \u00d7 7_500  / 10_000                   = 75 % of collateral","params":{"user":"Address to inspect."}},"getTotalDebt(address)":{"params":{"user":"Borrower address."}},"owner()":{"details":"Returns the address of the current owner."},"removeLiquidity(uint256)":{"params":{"amount":"Token amount to remove from the pool."}},"renounceOwnership()":{"details":"Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner."},"repay(uint256)":{"details":"TIMESTAMP RESET \u2014 lastInterestAccrualTimestamp is updated here too,         just like in borrow().  After a partial repay the remaining principal         starts a fresh interest window from now, preventing any scenario         where interest gets \"skipped\" because the timestamp wasn't touched.         PARTIAL REPAY \u2014 if `amount` >= fullDebt, the entire position is         closed and excess is not taken.  If `amount` < interest, revert so         the pool is never left with growing principal.","params":{"amount":"Tokens to repay.  Must be >= accrued interest at minimum."}},"transferOwnership(address)":{"details":"Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner."},"withdrawCollateral(uint256)":{"details":"In a production system you would allow partial withdrawal up to the         LTV threshold.  Simplicity here: full withdrawal requires zero debt.","params":{"amount":"Collateral amount to retrieve."}}},"stateVariables":{"borrowBalance":{"details":"Outstanding borrow principal for each user."},"collateralBalance":{"details":"Collateral deposited by each user (in token's native decimals)."},"lastInterestAccrualTimestamp":{"details":"block.timestamp when user last borrowed or repaid.      Critical: must be updated on BOTH borrow() and repay() so the      interest window is always correct and never skipped."},"totalPoolLiquidity":{"details":"Total tokens supplied to the pool by depositors."}},"title":"SimpleLending \u2014 Misty Bank \ud83c\udfe6","version":1},"userdoc":{"kind":"user","methods":{"ANNUAL_INTEREST_BPS()":{"notice":"Annual simple interest rate = 5.00 % = 500 BPS.         Calculation: (principal \u00d7 500) / 10_000 = 5 % of principal per year."},"BPS_PRECISION()":{"notice":"Precision divisor: 10_000 BPS = 100 %."},"LTV_BPS()":{"notice":"Maximum Loan-to-Value ratio = 75 % = 7_500 BPS.         A user depositing 1_000 tokens can borrow at most 750 tokens."},"SECONDS_PER_YEAR()":{"notice":"Seconds in a 365-day year.  Used in time-weighted interest math."},"addLiquidity(uint256)":{"notice":"Deposit tokens into the pool to make them available for borrowing.         Liquidity providers help borrowers \u2014 this is the \"bank vault.\""},"asset()":{"notice":"The ERC-20 token used as both collateral and borrowable asset.         In the MistyCoin ecosystem this is typically $WATERS."},"borrow(uint256)":{"notice":"Borrow tokens from the pool against your deposited collateral."},"calculateInterestAccrued(address)":{"notice":"Calculate simple interest accrued on a user's borrow position."},"depositCollateral(uint256)":{"notice":"Lock tokens as collateral.  Must be called before borrow()."},"emergencyWithdraw(uint256)":{"notice":"Emergency drain \u2014 owner-only.  In production, use a multi-sig."},"getMaxBorrow(address)":{"notice":"Returns the maximum tokens a user may borrow given their collateral."},"getPosition(address)":{"notice":"Returns a snapshot of a user's lending position."},"getTotalDebt(address)":{"notice":"Returns the total amount (principal + interest) owed by a user."},"removeLiquidity(uint256)":{"notice":"Withdraw idle pool liquidity (owner only \u2014 production pools use         LP-token accounting; this simplified version gives owner control)."},"repay(uint256)":{"notice":"Repay outstanding debt (principal + accrued interest)."},"withdrawCollateral(uint256)":{"notice":"Withdraw collateral \u2014 only allowed if you have no outstanding debt."}},"notice":"A minimal ERC-20 lending pool that lets users deposit collateral,         borrow up to 75 % of their collateral value, and accrue 5 % APR         simple interest using block.timestamp.","version":1}},"settings":{"compilationTarget":{"contracts/SimpleLending.sol":"SimpleLending"},"evmVersion":"cancun","libraries":{},"metadata":{"bytecodeHash":"ipfs"},"optimizer":{"enabled":true,"runs":200},"remappings":[":@openzeppelin/contracts/=lib/openzeppelin-contracts/contracts/",":erc4626-tests/=lib/openzeppelin-contracts/lib/erc4626-tests/",":forge-std/=lib/openzeppelin-contracts/lib/forge-std/src/",":halmos-cheatcodes/=lib/openzeppelin-contracts/lib/halmos-cheatcodes/src/",":openzeppelin-contracts/=lib/openzeppelin-contracts/"],"viaIR":true},"sources":{"contracts/SimpleLending.sol":{"keccak256":"0x6f38c715460a1ba911691153414e964967b14c0cde715f579b3a94dc0c4ecdf6","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://fc2696df6bdea59c12c15514b3ad20c9bbc3a62dadace081684bddf5df780a25","dweb:/ipfs/QmcC3xuVBMqiptCn9Aci2JgwwSjQ4GPQ9XTAwQu1JLZghW"]},"lib/openzeppelin-contracts/contracts/access/Ownable.sol":{"keccak256":"0xff6d0bb2e285473e5311d9d3caacb525ae3538a80758c10649a4d61029b017bb","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://8ed324d3920bb545059d66ab97d43e43ee85fd3bd52e03e401f020afb0b120f6","dweb:/ipfs/QmfEckWLmZkDDcoWrkEvMWhms66xwTLff9DDhegYpvHo1a"]},"lib/openzeppelin-contracts/contracts/interfaces/IERC1363.sol":{"keccak256":"0xd5ea07362ab630a6a3dee4285a74cf2377044ca2e4be472755ad64d7c5d4b69d","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://da5e832b40fc5c3145d3781e2e5fa60ac2052c9d08af7e300dc8ab80c4343100","dweb:/ipfs/QmTzf7N5ZUdh5raqtzbM11yexiUoLC9z3Ws632MCuycq1d"]},"lib/openzeppelin-contracts/contracts/interfaces/IERC165.sol":{"keccak256":"0x0afcb7e740d1537b252cb2676f600465ce6938398569f09ba1b9ca240dde2dfc","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://1c299900ac4ec268d4570ecef0d697a3013cd11a6eb74e295ee3fbc945056037","dweb:/ipfs/Qmab9owJoxcA7vJT5XNayCMaUR1qxqj1NDzzisduwaJMcZ"]},"lib/openzeppelin-contracts/contracts/interfaces/IERC20.sol":{"keccak256":"0x1a6221315ce0307746c2c4827c125d821ee796c74a676787762f4778671d4f44","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://1bb2332a7ee26dd0b0de9b7fe266749f54820c99ab6a3bcb6f7e6b751d47ee2d","dweb:/ipfs/QmcRWpaBeCYkhy68PR3B4AgD7asuQk7PwkWxrvJbZcikLF"]},"lib/openzeppelin-contracts/contracts/token/ERC20/IERC20.sol":{"keccak256":"0x74ed01eb66b923d0d0cfe3be84604ac04b76482a55f9dd655e1ef4d367f95bc2","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://5282825a626cfe924e504274b864a652b0023591fa66f06a067b25b51ba9b303","dweb:/ipfs/QmeCfPykghhMc81VJTrHTC7sF6CRvaA1FXVq2pJhwYp1dV"]},"lib/openzeppelin-contracts/contracts/token/ERC20/utils/SafeERC20.sol":{"keccak256":"0x304d732678032a9781ae85c8f204c8fba3d3a5e31c02616964e75cfdc5049098","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://299ced486011781dc98f638059678323c03079fefae1482abaa2135b22fa92d0","dweb:/ipfs/QmbZNbcPTBxNvwChavN2kkZZs7xHhYL7mv51KrxMhsMs3j"]},"lib/openzeppelin-contracts/contracts/utils/Context.sol":{"keccak256":"0x493033a8d1b176a037b2cc6a04dad01a5c157722049bbecf632ca876224dd4b2","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://6a708e8a5bdb1011c2c381c9a5cfd8a9a956d7d0a9dc1bd8bcdaf52f76ef2f12","dweb:/ipfs/Qmax9WHBnVsZP46ZxEMNRQpLQnrdE4dK8LehML1Py8FowF"]},"lib/openzeppelin-contracts/contracts/utils/ReentrancyGuard.sol":{"keccak256":"0xa516cbf1c7d15d3517c2d668601ce016c54395bf5171918a14e2686977465f53","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://1e1d079e8edfb58efd23a311e315a4807b01b5d1cf153f8fa2d0608b9dec3e99","dweb:/ipfs/QmTBExeX2SDTkn5xbk5ssbYSx7VqRp9H4Ux1CY4uQM4b9N"]},"lib/openzeppelin-contracts/contracts/utils/StorageSlot.sol":{"keccak256":"0xcf74f855663ce2ae00ed8352666b7935f6cddea2932fdf2c3ecd30a9b1cd0e97","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://9f660b1f351b757dfe01438e59888f31f33ded3afcf5cb5b0d9bf9aa6f320a8b","dweb:/ipfs/QmarDJ5hZEgBtCmmrVzEZWjub9769eD686jmzb2XpSU1cM"]},"lib/openzeppelin-contracts/contracts/utils/introspection/IERC165.sol":{"keccak256":"0x8891738ffe910f0cf2da09566928589bf5d63f4524dd734fd9cedbac3274dd5c","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://971f954442df5c2ef5b5ebf1eb245d7105d9fbacc7386ee5c796df1d45b21617","dweb:/ipfs/QmadRjHbkicwqwwh61raUEapaVEtaLMcYbQZWs9gUkgj3u"]}},"version":1}

params.amount: Token amount to add to the pool (must be pre-approved).

borrow(uint256).details: LTV CHECK (Basis Point Standard)         maxBorrow = collateral × LTV_BPS / BPS_PRECISION                   = collateral × 7_500  / 10_000                   = 75 % of collateral         TIMESTAMP INIT — lastInterestAccrualTimestamp is set here so the         first interest window starts at the moment of the first borrow,         not at contract deployment.  Subsequent borrows reset the clock on         the FULL balance (accrued interest is rolled into principal first).

calculateInterestAccrued(address).details: INTEREST FORMULA (annotated step-by-step)         Step 1 — elapsed seconds since last accrual:           elapsed = block.timestamp − lastInterestAccrualTimestamp[user]         Step 2 — annual interest in tokens (BPS standard):           annualInterest = principal × ANNUAL_INTEREST_BPS / BPS_PRECISION                          = principal × 500 / 10_000                          = 5 % of principal         Step 3 — pro-rate to elapsed seconds:           accrued = annualInterest × elapsed / SECONDS_PER_YEAR         Combined (single expression to avoid phantom overflow):           accrued = principal × ANNUAL_INTEREST_BPS × elapsed                     / SECONDS_PER_YEAR / BPS_PRECISION         NOTE: Division is done last-of-last (after both multiplications)         so precision is always maintained at the largest intermediate value.         TIMESTAMP EDGE CASES HANDLED:         • First borrow ever    → lastTimestamp == 0 → elapsed == now           (handled by initialising timestamp in borrow())         • Same-block call      → elapsed == 0 → accrued == 0 ✓         • Post-repay call      → timestamp reset → no double counting ✓

depositCollateral(uint256).details: Tokens transfer from msg.sender → this contract.         Follows C-E-I: validate → state change → external call.

getMaxBorrow(address).details: maxBorrow = collateral × LTV_BPS / BPS_PRECISION                   = collateral × 7_500  / 10_000                   = 75 % of collateral

owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

params.amount: Token amount to remove from the pool.

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.

repay(uint256).details: TIMESTAMP RESET — lastInterestAccrualTimestamp is updated here too,         just like in borrow().  After a partial repay the remaining principal         starts a fresh interest window from now, preventing any scenario         where interest gets "skipped" because the timestamp wasn't touched.         PARTIAL REPAY — if `amount` >= fullDebt, the entire position is         closed and excess is not taken.  If `amount` < interest, revert so         the pool is never left with growing principal.

params.amount: Tokens to repay.  Must be >= accrued interest at minimum.

transferOwnership(address).details: Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner.

withdrawCollateral(uint256).details: In a production system you would allow partial withdrawal up to the         LTV threshold.  Simplicity here: full withdrawal requires zero debt.

ANNUAL_INTEREST_BPS().notice: Annual simple interest rate = 5.00 % = 500 BPS.         Calculation: (principal × 500) / 10_000 = 5 % of principal per year.

LTV_BPS().notice: Maximum Loan-to-Value ratio = 75 % = 7_500 BPS.         A user depositing 1_000 tokens can borrow at most 750 tokens.

SECONDS_PER_YEAR().notice: Seconds in a 365-day year.  Used in time-weighted interest math.

addLiquidity(uint256).notice: Deposit tokens into the pool to make them available for borrowing.         Liquidity providers help borrowers — this is the "bank vault."

asset().notice: The ERC-20 token used as both collateral and borrowable asset.         In the MistyCoin ecosystem this is typically $WATERS.

borrow(uint256).notice: Borrow tokens from the pool against your deposited collateral.

calculateInterestAccrued(address).notice: Calculate simple interest accrued on a user's borrow position.

depositCollateral(uint256).notice: Lock tokens as collateral.  Must be called before borrow().

emergencyWithdraw(uint256).notice: Emergency drain — owner-only.  In production, use a multi-sig.

getMaxBorrow(address).notice: Returns the maximum tokens a user may borrow given their collateral.

getPosition(address).notice: Returns a snapshot of a user's lending position.

getTotalDebt(address).notice: Returns the total amount (principal + interest) owed by a user.

removeLiquidity(uint256).notice: Withdraw idle pool liquidity (owner only — production pools use         LP-token accounting; this simplified version gives owner control).

withdrawCollateral(uint256).notice: Withdraw collateral — only allowed if you have no outstanding debt.
